title: Better Campfire Cooking
description: It makes campfires better by adding new recipies, doesn't impact performance much.
body:
Have you ever been like "campfires are so op because ther don't need fuel to cook, but they can only cook food"? Well...
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

it makes camfires better with structures, loot tables, crafting recepies and more. Deosn't impact performance much and is very compatable. 

</details>
